languages.text: "Знаешь... забирай и Номоса, и то, за чем охотится Калькасар. Я по горло сыт{mf||а} загадками вселенной, от которых одни неприятности".
"You know what? Take Nomos and whatever Calcazar is after. I've had enough of the mysteries of the universe — they bring nothing but trouble."
languages.original_text: "Знаешь... забирай и Номоса, и то, за чем охотится Калькасар. Я по горло сыт{mf||а} загадками вселенной, от которых одни неприятности".

traits.locale_text: "You know what? Take Nomos and whatever Calcazar is after. I've had enough of the mysteries of the universe — they bring nothing but trouble."
"You know what? Take Nomos and whatever Calcazar is after. I've had enough of the mysteries of the universe — they bring nothing but trouble."
"You know what? Take Nomos and whatever Calcazar is after. I've had enough of the mysteries of the universe — they bring nothing but trouble."

languages.text: «¿Sabe qué? Llévese a Nomos y lo que sea que busca Calcazar. Ya he tenido bastante de los misterios del universo; no me dan más que problemas».
languages.original_text: "You know what? Take Nomos and whatever Calcazar is after. I've had enough of the mysteries of the universe — they bring nothing but trouble."

traits.locale_text: «¿Sabe qué? Llévese a Nomos y lo que sea que busca Calcazar. Ya he tenido bastante de los misterios del universo; no me dan más que problemas».

languages.text: “把卡尔卡扎在寻找的东西以及诺莫斯都拿走吧。我受够了这些宇宙的无解之谜，它们只会带来麻烦。”
languages.original_text: "You know what? Take Nomos and whatever Calcazar is after. I've had enough of the mysteries of the universe — they bring nothing but trouble."

traits.locale_text: “把卡尔卡扎在寻找的东西以及诺莫斯都拿走吧。我受够了这些宇宙的无解之谜，它们只会带来麻烦。”

languages.text: « Je vais vous dire... Vous n'avez qu'à prendre Nomos et quoi que Calcazar puisse chercher. J'en ai assez des mystères de l'univers, ils n'apportent que des ennuis. »
languages.original_text: "You know what? Take Nomos and whatever Calcazar is after. I've had enough of the mysteries of the universe — they bring nothing but trouble."

traits.locale_text: « Je vais vous dire... Vous n'avez qu'à prendre Nomos et quoi que Calcazar puisse chercher. J'en ai assez des mystères de l'univers, ils n'apportent que des ennuis. »

languages.text: "Bak ne diyeceğim... Nomos'u ve Calcazar'ın peşinde olduğu her neyse onu al. Evrenin gizemlerinden bıktım artık. Beladan başka bir şey getirmiyorlar."
languages.original_text: "You know what? Take Nomos and whatever Calcazar is after. I've had enough of the mysteries of the universe — they bring nothing but trouble."

traits.locale_text: "Bak ne diyeceğim... Nomos'u ve Calcazar'ın peşinde olduğu her neyse onu al. Evrenin gizemlerinden bıktım artık. Beladan başka bir şey getirmiyorlar."

languages.text: "Wisst Ihr was? Nehmt Nomos und was immer Calcazar will. Ich habe genug von den Mysterien des Universums ... sie machen nichts als Ärger."
languages.original_text: "You know what? Take Nomos and whatever Calcazar is after. I've had enough of the mysteries of the universe — they bring nothing but trouble."

traits.locale_text: "Wisst Ihr was? Nehmt Nomos und was immer Calcazar will. Ich habe genug von den Mysterien des Universums ... sie machen nichts als Ärger."

languages.text: 「わかった。ノモスとカルカザルの後を追う。宇宙の謎にうんざりだ。何もいいことない。 」
languages.original_text: "You know what? Take Nomos and whatever Calcazar is after. I've had enough of the mysteries of the universe — they bring nothing but trouble."

traits.locale_text: 「わかった。ノモスとカルカザルの後を追う。宇宙の謎にうんざりだ。何もいいことない。 」
